response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches JSON reference for song lyrics and scene descriptions. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Reference JSON for song lyrics and structure. Manual transcription was performed for the introductory talk segment and visual text (character select, loading screens, song credits). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal audio. Applied Rule 3 (Instantaneous Transitions) for rapid chorus segments to prevent cascading delays. Included visual text subtitles for on-screen menus and song credits during instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: ...ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: ...please post about it!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド入り、よろしくだああ！
subtitles.english: Aim for the trending list, please!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、ちょっと息が整ってないですけど...
subtitles.english: Yes, so, I'm a bit out of breath, but...

subtitles.original: さて、今年の生誕ライブ、テーマは...
subtitles.english: Now, this year's birthday live theme is...

subtitles.original: 『ゲームソングライブ』です！
subtitles.english: "Game Song Live"!

subtitles.original: これまでたくさんやってきた実況配信で 一緒に遊んできた思い出のゲームや
subtitles.english: From the many game streams I've done so far, games full of memories we've played together,

subtitles.original: こよが大好きなゲーム関連の楽曲をたくさん詰め込みました！
subtitles.english: and songs related to games Koyo loves, I've packed so many of them in!

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力で楽しんでってね！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy yourselves to the fullest until the very end!

subtitles.original: ということで、1曲目は大好きなポケモンのXYZを歌わせていただきました！ねー！
subtitles.english: So, for the first song, I sang XYZ from my favorite, Pokemon! Right!

subtitles.original: 助手くーん！
subtitles.english: Josh-kuuuun!

subtitles.original: はい。俺はこいつと旅に出る、っていうことで。
subtitles.english: Yes. "I'm going on a journey with this guy," just like that.

subtitles.original: はい。Xでセトリ予想もね、みんなにたくさんしてもらってたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes. I had everyone do lots of setlist predictions on X too,

subtitles.original: ポケモンの予想は結構多かったけど、XYZ当てられてる人は結構少なかったです。
subtitles.english: and while there were many Pokemon guesses, quite few people correctly predicted XYZ.

subtitles.original: 当たった君、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: To those who got it right, congratulations!

subtitles.original: ま、この曲は、ま、Z-Aが発売になったっていうのもあるんですけど、
subtitles.english: Well, for this song, part of it is because Legends Z-A was announced,

subtitles.original: 歌詞がめっちゃ良くて、実はこよりにもピッタリな曲なので選びました。
subtitles.english: but the lyrics are so good and it's actually a perfect song for Koyo, so I chose it.

subtitles.original: さあ、このあとも自分の予想が当たってるかなーって、ドキドキしながら楽しんでいってください。
subtitles.english: Now, please continue to enjoy while feeling nervous about whether your predictions will come true.

subtitles.original: 新3Dお披露目もあるからね！絶対最後まで見てってね！
subtitles.english: There's also a new 3D reveal! Make sure to watch until the very end!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ次の曲。
subtitles.english: Now, it's about time for the next song.

subtitles.original: ゲームの世界へ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Into the world of games, please!

subtitles.original: [キャラクター選択]
subtitles.english: [Visual: Character Select]

subtitles.original: [ロード中...]
subtitles.english: [Visual: Loading...]

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せない
subtitles.english: I Can't Beat Airman

subtitles.original: 作詞：せら / たかにそ 作曲：せら
subtitles.english: Lyrics: Sera / Takaniso Composition: Sera

subtitles.original: 気がついたら 同じ面ばかりプレイ
subtitles.english: When I realized it, I was playing the same level,

subtitles.original: そしていつも 同じ場所で死ぬ
subtitles.english: and always dying in the same place.

subtitles.original: あきらめずに 消える足場に挑戦するけど
subtitles.english: I don't give up, I keep challenging the disappearing platforms,

subtitles.original: すぐに下が落ちるよー
subtitles.english: but I fall straight down.

subtitles.original: 「アイテム2号」があれば 楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
subtitles.english: If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other shore,

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: but no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ！
subtitles.english: I can't beat Airman!

subtitles.original: あの竜巻何回やってもよけれない！
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, I can't dodge those tornadoes!

subtitles.original: 後ろに回って打ち続けるけれど いずれ風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: I try to go behind and keep shooting, but eventually, I get blown away by the wind.

subtitles.original: タイム連打を試してみたけど 竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い！！
subtitles.english: I tried button-mashing the time, but it's meaningless against the tornado!!

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to win next time,

subtitles.original: 僕は「E缶」だけは 最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save only the E-Tank until the very end.

subtitles.original: 気がついたら 「ライフ」もう少しかない
subtitles.english: When I realized, I had only a little bit of life left,

subtitles.original: 吸収つもそこで「E缶」使う
subtitles.english: and I always use an E-Tank there.

subtitles.original: あきらめずに エアーマンまでたどり着くけれど
subtitles.english: I don't give up, I reach Airman,

subtitles.original: すぐにザンキなくなる
subtitles.english: but I run out of lives immediately.

subtitles.original: リーフシールドがあれば 楽にエアーマンを倒せるけど
subtitles.english: If I had Leaf Shield, I could easily beat Airman,

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: but no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: ウッドマンがたおせないよ！！
subtitles.english: I can't beat Woodman!!

subtitles.original: 落ちる木の葉は 何回やってもよけれない！
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, I can't dodge those falling leaves!

subtitles.original: 後ろに下がって 距離をとっても いずれ距離をつめられる
subtitles.english: Even if I go behind and keep my distance, eventually, the distance is closed.

subtitles.original: タイム連打を試してみたけど あいつのジャンプはくぐれない！
subtitles.english: I tried button-mashing the time, but I can't slip past his jump!

subtitles.original: だけど次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to win next time,

subtitles.original: 僕は「E缶」だけは 最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save only the E-Tank until the very end.

subtitles.original: 「アイテム2号」があれば 楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
subtitles.english: If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other shore,

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: but no matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ！
subtitles.english: I can't beat Airman!

subtitles.original: あの竜巻...
subtitles.english: Those tornadoes...
